case_title: LIDILIA DEL S. MURILLO DE CENTENO VS. FORD MOTOR COMPANY, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100189671) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURILLO DE CENTENO, LIDILIA DEL S.

MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-23-2024 AT 10:00AM IN DEPT. 206. KEVIN Y. JACOBSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. COURT TAKES THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OFF CALENDAR AND VACATES SANCTIONS. MASTER JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-09-2024. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTORNEY KEVIN Y JACOBSON SET FOR SEP-23-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 10:00 AM FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100202980) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MURILLO DE CENTENO, LIDILIA DEL S.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100221382) FILED BY ATTORNEY TULLY, KEVIN JOHN

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-09-2024 - CASE SETTLED. ROY ENAV, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON FEB-04-2025 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. COURT ISSUES AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO ATTORNEY KEVIN JACOBSON AND WHY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S RULE ON THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAS FAILED TO INFORM THE COURT HABITUALLY WHETHER THE CASE HAS SETTLED OR GIVE AN UPDATE. MISS NIELSEN, COURT STAFF ATTORNEY, HAS LEFT VOICEMAIL MESSAGES ON 9/3/24 AND 9/4/24 AND THERE WAS NO RESPONSE FROM COUNSEL AND ALSO SENT AN E-MAIL WITH NO REPLY FROM COUNSEL. MR. JACOBSON NEEDS TO APPEAR IN COURT IN PERSON ON 9/23/24 AT 10:00AM AND EXPLAIN TO THE COURT WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S RULE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DECLARATION OF KEVIN Y. JACOBSON IN RESPONSE TO THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING WHY SANCTIONS SHOUL NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S RULE. (TRANSACTION ID # 74319304) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURILLO DE CENTENO, LIDILIA DEL S. RIVERA, RAFAEL ANTONIO CENTENO AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100189671) TO PLAINTIFF MURILLO DE CENTENO, LIDILIA DEL S.
